---
title: "Publications"
editor: visual
---

::: callout-note
## Links

> -   **Google Scholar**: <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-r5foIsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN>
> -   **ORCID**: <https://orcid.org/0009-0004-8018-0909>
<!-- > -   **ResearchGate:** <https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Yujun-Lian> -->
:::

 

## Journal articles

- Working on writing it.

## Conference Papers

- **He Y**, Yang Y. Research on the spatial distribution and influencing factors of B&Bs in Liangshan prefecture based on GIS spatial analysis and spatial econometric model[C]//International Conference on Mechatronics and Intelligent Control (ICMIC 2024). SPIE, 2025, 13447: 1300-1320.[-Link-](https://www.spiedigitallibrary.org/conference-proceedings-of-spie/13447/134474P/Research-on-the-spatial-distribution-and-influencing-factors-of-BBs/10.1117/12.3049158.short), [-PDF-](), [-Code-]()
- Wang R, **He Y**, Li S, et al. Forest fire monitoring based on the remote sensing technology[C]//Fifth International Conference on Geology, Mapping, and Remote Sensing (ICGMRS 2024). SPIE, 2024, 13223: 505-508.[-Link-](https://www.spiedigitallibrary.org/conference-proceedings-of-spie/13223/1322322/Forest-fire-monitoring-based-on-the-remote-sensing-technology/10.1117/12.3035651.short), [-PDF-](), [-Code-]()
- **He Y**, Ju X. XiChang City land dynamic changes based on the remote sensing data[C]//Fourth International Conference on Geology, Mapping, and Remote Sensing (ICGMRS 2023). SPIE, 2024, 12978: 277-282.[-Link-](https://www.spiedigitallibrary.org/conference-proceedings-of-spie/12978/1297818/XiChang-City-land-dynamic-changes-based-on-the-remote-sensing/10.1117/12.3020749.short), [-PDF-](), [-Code-]()
- **Y. He**, S. Zhou and X. Quan, "Remote Sensing Image Scene Classification Based on ECA Attention Mechanism Convolutional Neural Network," 2022 IEEE 4th International Conference on Civil Aviation Safety and Information Technology (ICCASIT), Dali, China, 2022, pp. 1265-1269, doi: 10.1109/ICCASIT55725.2022.9949337.[-Link-](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9987089), [-PDF-](), [-Code-]()
